lines.speaker: Group Storage tutor
lines.text: Good day! I'm here to to teach you about group storage, and to let you access your personal bank. You can call me Maggie. How may I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I use the group storage?

lines.speaker: Group Storage tutor
lines.text: You can access the group storage via the button in the top-left of your bank interface. Only one member of the group may access the storage at one time.

lines.speaker: Group Storage tutor
lines.text: You will then be able to deposit and withdraw items from the group storage. You can't deposit untradeable items.

lines.speaker: Group Storage tutor
lines.text: When you have finished, click the 'Save' button to confirm the transaction.

lines.speaker: Group Storage tutor
lines.text: Can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to access my bank account please.

lines.speaker: Group Storage tutor
lines.text: This bank is for new adventurers only, you cannot access it as you've already started your Group Ironman journey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to check my PIN settings.
